problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
hypothesis: If Liquid crystal elastomer actuation is applied to microcracks, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
